commands.command: python3 -c "import subprocess; diff=subprocess.check_output(['git','diff','--submodule=short','--','git-ranker'], text=True); assert 'fbc672c6384eb896183f838be7413e195e388dc5' in diff, diff; print(diff.strip())"
commands.output:

commands.command: python3 -c "import subprocess; sha=subprocess.check_output(['git','-C','git-ranker','rev-parse','HEAD'], text=True).strip(); assert sha == 'fbc672c6384eb896183f838be7413e195e388dc5', sha; print(sha)"
